prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical illustration of an adult businesswoman standing confidently in a bright modern office. The character has glossy black hair tied in a high messy bun with loose strands framing her face, and her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth square censor blur with no visible facial features. She wears a fitted black cropped suit jacket with rolled three-quarter sleeves over a white button-up shirt, a narrow black necktie, and low-rise black tailored slacks; the outfit is sharply rendered with glossy fabric highlights, visible buttons, lapels, pocket flaps, belt loops, and crisp seams. Her pose is a low-angle three-quarter view from mid-thigh upward, torso slightly arched and leaning back, one hand hooked near the waistband and the other resting at the pocket, emphasizing a confident fashion-editorial stance and exposed midriff. Set the scene in a clean corporate office with large floor-to-ceiling windows behind her, white window frames, a bright city skyline with blue skyscrapers in the distance, beige walls, tiled ceiling panels with fluorescent lights, glossy pale floor, dark baseboards, and one black-and-blue office chair partly visible at the left edge. Use dramatic daylight backlighting from the windows, strong rim highlights, soft shadows, high-detail cel-shaded anime rendering, sleek digital painting, realistic office perspective, sharp linework, and a professional fashion illustration feel. Keep the composition vertical 3:4, centered on the woman, with no text, no watermark, and no extra characters.
